The Isuzu Trooper has been badge-engineered the most among the options, sold under names like the Acura SLX, Chevrolet Trooper, Holden Jackaroo, Opel Monterey, and Subaru Bighorn. The Suzuki Swift and Chevy Camaro have had fewer rebadges, while the Holden Monaro was primarily rebadged as the Pontiac GTO and Vauxhall Monaro. Thus, the correct answer is C.

\boxed{C}
